email.subject: Web3 Security Role at Nethermind for a Talented Rust & AI Developer
email.body:
Hi Noah,

I came across your profile and was impressed by your expertise in cybersecurity, AI, Rust, and open-source contributions. Your background aligns perfectly with the Web3 Security Triager role at Nethermind, where we focus on AuditAgent & AgentArena for blockchain security.

Your experience with Linux systems and AI, combined with your passion for cybersecurity, makes you a strong candidate. While Solana and Solidity are new areas, your foundational skills and learning agility are exactly what we value for this role.

This is a remote position offering growth in Web3. Would you be open to a quick chat to discuss further?

Best regards,
[Your Name]
Talent Team, Nethermind
